name: house-rules
description: Every folder has house rules — write them down, keep them true. Per-directory AGENTS.md docs inferred from real sibling files, kept fresh with an on-demand check you can wire into your own pre-push hook or CI. Skill: /house-rules (<dir> | --all | --init | --check | --backfill). Self-contained Agent Skill — also runs in Codex CLI.
